description_long: This is a plus-sized adult woman with a full, rounded body shape, standing with arms extended horizontally. She is wearing a bikini-style swimsuit, with a halter top and matching bottoms, revealing most of her skin. Her skin is smooth and evenly toned, and her feet are bare. The figure has a prominent abdomen, broad hips, and thick limbs, with visible folds and natural body contours. Her hair is styled in a medium-length ponytail that falls down her back. The overall appearance is realistic and expressive, suitable for urban or public environments.
description: A plus-sized adult woman in a bikini, standing with arms outstretched and hair in a ponytail. The figure is barefoot and features realistic body proportions and details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face, chest, abdomen, and outstretched arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, chest, rounded belly, and ponytail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back, bikini straps, ponytail, and the backs of the arms and legs.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, chest, belly, and ponytail from the opposite side.
attribute_clothing_type: bikini-style swimsuit with halter top and matching bottoms
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
